name: weekly_recap
description: Quartermaster posts the Friday weekly recap — top builders, total points approved, monuments raised, streak status. Runs Fridays at 5pm.

message.value: Run job: weekly_recap. Query all placements where state='established', grouped by builder to compute top contributors and total points approved. Count how many teammates contributed. Compose the Friday recap: total points approved, top builders with their monuments, total teammates who built something, and a streak note. Log to agent_actions (kind=recap). Return the full recap.
